de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events

Class ExitKeYEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events.NotificationEvent
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events.ExitKeYEvent

  • public class ExitKeYEvent
extends NotificationEvent
    An exit key event indicating that KeY is currently shut down.
    Author:
    bubel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExitKeYEvent()
      creates an event fired when KeY is shutdown
